title: Projection layer and Markdown content parser
description:
Implements decision record (dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine.md) section 6.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] Issues normalize to a canonical JSON projection: labels grouped by namespace plus structured fields.
- [hard] A NEW content-parser trait yields one canonical structure (sections, items, headings, attributes, text), reusing DocFormatAdapter::detect for format detection rather than duplicating it.
- [hard] A Markdown parser (pulldown-cmark; review/bump the 0.9 pin) implements the trait; pure, no I/O; unit-tested.
